messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Network Firewall

### Features

- Stateful inspection
- Intrusion detection
- URL filtering
- Threat intelligence

### Setup

```bash
oci network firewall create \
  --compartment-id $COM \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name my-firewall

# Create policy
oci network firewall policy create \
  --compartment-id $COM \
  --name fw-policy
```

### Common Issues

| Issue | Solution |
|-------|----------|
| Traffic blocked | Check rules |
| Latency | Firewall processing |
| No logging | Enable audit |

### Rules

```
# Allow
Source: Any
Dest: Any
App: HTTP
Action: Allow

# Deny
Source: Any
Dest: BlockedIP
Action: Deny
```

### Monitoring

- OCI Logging
- Audit logs
- Flow logs

### Cost

- Per hour + throughput
- Minimum 1 Gbps
